name: agent_task_progress_clear
description: Clear saved progress data for tasks. Use this to clean up completed tasks, remove abandoned progress, or maintain agent memory hygiene. Agent context is automatically inferred from the agent's team membership.

task_id.description: Specific task ID to clear (required for 'clear_task' action)

older_than_hours.description: For 'clear_completed' or 'clear_abandoned' - only clear progress older than this many hours

reason.description: Reason for clearing progress (for logging/audit purposes)

parameters.reason: Task completed successfully, cleaning up progress data
Regular cleanup of completed task progress
Cleaning up tasks that have been stuck for 3+ days
Agent reset - clearing all progress data
